category_sources: Official catb.org wumpus resource page summarizes it as retrocomputing nostalgia and links the project repository.
source_facts.description says it is an exact clone of the ancient BASIC Hunt the Wumpus game.
display_name_sources: Official catb.org resource page title and GitLab repository use wumpus.
docs_sources: Official catb.org resource page is the maintained project documentation surface.
Official catb.org resource page lists wumpus.html as Documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://gitlab.com/esr/wumpus, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Hunt the Wumpus game.
source_facts.executables includes terminal executables wumpus and superhack.
